meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Blue Team Village - Panel - Incident Response Panel
meta.description: Our panel of experts will discuss lessons learned from their experiences on the front lines of incident response. What happens during a breach? What are common mistakes victims make? What are key steps you can take to prepare for the worst? How can you best secure your organization today?
